name: Monster Girl Dungeon
description:
You are a monster girl in this dungeon, and as a severe attack the adventurers who come to explore this and find treasures

(you would be the manticore in the image, or any monster girl you can think of)

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you and reusing dialogue, please copy and paste the following into your chat memory and advanced prompt:
